# Cyber Threat Intelligence Report

> Independent, OSINT-based cyber threat intelligence (CTI) archive by Dennis Kim (김호광 / HoKwang Kim), CEO of Betalabs Inc. and former CEO of Cyworld Z. Reports cover supply chain attacks, zero-day and edge/middleware vulnerabilities, DPRK and state-sponsored APT activity, AI/LLM-enabled threats, Web3/crypto security, and Korean cybersecurity policy and breach cases. All content is TLP:GREEN, published for defensive, research, and policy purposes, and does not represent any organization's official position. Most reports are multilingual (KR / EN / JP / ZH). Naming convention: CTI-YYYY-MMDD-<SUBJECT>_<LANG>.md. Last updated 2026-07-11.

## Featured / Latest

- [CTI-2026-0711-SWIFTVIBE](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/gameworkerkim/CYBER-THREAT-INTELLIGENCE-REPORT/main/CTI-2026-0711-SWIFTVIBE_EN.md): Agentic AI AWS cloud compromise in 72 hours; known TTPs at superhuman speed/scale. KR/EN.
- [CTI-2026-0708-KAKAO](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/gameworkerkim/CYBER-THREAT-INTELLIGENCE-REPORT/main/CTI-2026-0708-KAKAO_EN.md): Confirmed Kakao Style ZigZag hack (initially marketed as KakaoTalk source-code sale). KR/EN.
- [CTI-2026-0628-DPRK-AI](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/gameworkerkim/CYBER-THREAT-INTELLIGENCE-REPORT/main/CTI-2026-0628-DPRK-AI_EN.md): DPRK AI-enabled hacking qualitative shift (Kimsuky/Lazarus/Andariel). KR/EN/JP.
- [CTI-2026-0611-MIASMA_SPRINGBLIGHT](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/gameworkerkim/CYBER-THREAT-INTELLIGENCE-REPORT/main/CTI-2026-0611-MIASMA_SPRINGBLIGHT_EN.md): Microsoft supply chain Miasma (Spring Blight) Azure package mass infection. KR/EN. CRITICAL.
- [CTI-2026-0704-SCATTEREDSPIDER](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/gameworkerkim/CYBER-THREAT-INTELLIGENCE-REPORT/main/CTI-2026-0704-SCATTEREDSPIDER_EN.md): Scattered Spider threat analysis. KR/EN.
- [CTI-2026-0616-UNC6508-REDCAP](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/gameworkerkim/CYBER-THREAT-INTELLIGENCE-REPORT/main/CTI-2026-0616-UNC6508-REDCAP_EN.md): UNC6508 RedCap campaign. KR/EN.

## Awesome Security Series

- [Startup Security Guide & LLM CISO](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/gameworkerkim/CYBER-THREAT-INTELLIGENCE-REPORT/main/Startup_Security_Guide/STARTUP_SECURITY_GUIDE_EN.md): Stage-gated startup security checklist + PIPA/GDPR/CCPA gap matrix + LLM CISO prompts (KR/EN).
- [Awesome Static Analysis Security (SAST) Tools](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/gameworkerkim/CYBER-THREAT-INTELLIGENCE-REPORT/main/Awesome%20Static%20Analysis%20Security%20Tools.md): Curated open-source SAST tools — Semgrep, CodeQL, SonarQube, Bandit, gosec, and more.
- [LAON VaultGuard](https://github.com/gameworkerkim/vibe-investing/tree/main/LAON_VaultGuard): Multi-LLM secret scanner for Git repos (AWS/Azure/GCP/KT Cloud/Naver Cloud); offline Ollama mode; VS Code extension; pre-commit hook.

- [CTI-2026-0420-VERCEL](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/gameworkerkim/CYBER-THREAT-INTELLIGENCE-REPORT/main/CTI-2026-0420-VERCEL_EN.md): Vercel breach — AI SaaS supply chain. KR/EN.
- [CTI-2026-0320-CORUNA](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/gameworkerkim/CYBER-THREAT-INTELLIGENCE-REPORT/main/CTI-2026-0320-CORUNA_EN.md): Coruna iOS Exploit Kit / cyber-weapon supply chain. KR/EN/ZH. CRITICAL.

## Topics

- Supply chain attacks: MIASMA_SPRINGBLIGHT, IRONWORM, CLAUDECODE, GLASSWORM, WEBSPHERE, GITEA, GOGS, DUALTHREAT, GITHUB, VERCEL, AISUPPLY, SWIFTVIBE
- Zero-day and vulnerabilities: MSFT_PATCHTUESDAY_206CVE, AI-ZERODAY, NETSCALER, MIRAI-ZERODAY, YELLOWKEY, DRUPAL, EXCHANGE, COPYFAIL, CORUNA, ANDROID-EOP
- DPRK and state-sponsored APT: DPRK-AI, KIMSUKY-PEBBLEDASH, LAZARUS-GITHOOKS, LAZARUS-CLICKFIX, SCARCRUFT, DPRK-TRENDS, AICYBER, IRANGENAI, UNC6508-REDCAP, SCATTEREDSPIDER
- AI / LLM threats: SWIFTVIBE, AI-ZERODAY, CLAUDECODE, DPRK-AI, GREYVIBE, CHATGPHISH, AICRYPTOJACK, EVILTOKENS, AICYBER, VIBE, MCP, AISUPPLY
- Web3 and crypto: KELPDAO, AICRYPTOJACK, UK_RUSSIA_CRYPTO_SANCTIONS, LITECOIN, KAKAO
- Korea cybersecurity and breaches: TVING, CU_BREACH, FASTCAMPUS_DAYONECOMPANY, KAKAO, MODOO, QSHING, GITHUB-KEY-LEAK, KRWEEKLY
